# Gateway

Get gateway info


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/gateways/{gatewayMac}

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get gateway info

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39501 - This gateway does not exist.

-39507 - Gateway mirroring port reaches max limit.

-39706 - Please choose at least one port or LAG to be mirrored.

-39718 - Mirrored ports contain invalid port.

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| gatewayMac | Gateway MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGatewayInfo |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GatewayInfo | GatewayInfo |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"mac": "",
		"showModel": "",
		"firmwareVersion": "",
		"ip": "",
		"uptime": "",
		"temp": 0,
		"cpuUtil": 0,
		"memUtil": 0,
		"ipv6List": [],
		"lastSeen": 0,
		"portConfigs": [\
			{\
				"port": 0,\
				"linkSpeed": 0,\
				"duplex": 0,\
				"mirrorEnable": true,\
				"mirroredPorts": [],\
				"mirrorMode": 0,\
				"pvid": 0,\
				"flowControl": true,\
				"status": 0,\
				"dslSettings": {\
					"modulationType": 0,\
					"annexType": 0,\
					"bitSwap": 0,\
					"sra": 0\
				}\
			}\
		],
		"multiChipGateway": true,
		"multiChipInfos": []
	}
}
```

Modify gateway port config


PATCH/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/gateways/{gatewayMac}/ports/{port}/config

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify gateway port config

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39501 - This gateway does not exist.

-39507 - Gateway mirroring port reaches max limit.

-39706 - Please choose at least one port or LAG to be mirrored.

-39718 - Mirrored ports contain invalid port.

Example


```
{
  "linkSpeed": 0,
  "duplex": 0,
  "mirrorEnable": true,
  "mirroredPorts": [],
  "mirrorMode": 0,
  "pvid": 0,
  "flowControl": true,
  "status": 0,
  "poeMode": 0,
  "dslSettings": {
    "modulationType": 0,
    "annexType": 0,
    "bitSwap": 0,
    "sra": 0
  }
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| gatewayMac | Gateway MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| port | Gateway port number | path | true | string |  |
| gatewayPortSettingConfig | GatewayPortSettingConfig | body | true | GatewayPortSettingConfig | GatewayPortSettingConfig |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGatewayPortSettingConfig |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GatewayPortSettingConfig | GatewayPortSettingConfig |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"linkSpeed": 0,
		"duplex": 0,
		"mirrorEnable": true,
		"mirroredPorts": [],
		"mirrorMode": 0,
		"pvid": 0,
		"flowControl": true,
		"status": 0,
		"poeMode": 0,
		"dslSettings": {
			"modulationType": 0,
			"annexType": 0,
			"bitSwap": 0,
			"sra": 0
		}
	}
}

produces

"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\

"\*/\*"\
\]

Upgrade isp

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39501 - This gateway does not exist.

-44301 - Failed to get any response from the gateway.

-44303 - Failed to upgrade isp file.

-44304 - Cannot perform the operation because file has exceeded the maximum cache time (5 min).

-44305 - Do not make any configuration changes until the device is stably connected.

-44306 - ISP file is too old.

-44307 - Failed to upload the ISP file. Please select the correct file and try again.

Example


```
{
  "fileId": ""
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |

| code | description | schema |

Modify PIN management information of an LTE model


PUT/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/gateways/{gatewayMac}/pin

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify PIN management information of an LTE model.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-35411 - The gateway does not support Dual-SIM standby.

-44301 - Failed to get any response from the gateway.

-44305 - Do not make any configuration changes until the device is stably connected.

-44308 - Filed to change sim pin setting, please check your sim card status

Example


```
{
  "type": 0,
  "firstTry": true,
  "pinCode": "",
  "pukCode": "",
  "newPinCode": "",
  "pinSetting": {
    "cardStatus": 0,
    "pinLock": true,
    "autoUnLock": true,
    "simCardUsed": 0
  },
  "simCard": 0
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| gatewayMac | Gateway MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| osgLtePinOpenApiVO | OsgLtePinOpenApiVO | body | true | OsgLtePinOpenApiVO | OsgLtePinOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseOsgLtePinLockResultOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | OsgLtePinLockResultOpenApiVO | OsgLtePinLockResultOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"tryPinLimit": 0,
		"tryPinResult": true,
		"tryPukLimit": 0,
		"tryPukResult": true
	}
}
```

"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]

"\*/\*"\

Note


Get PIN setting.

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39501 - This gateway does not exist.

-44300 - The gateway does not support pin management.

-44301 - Failed to get any response from the gateway.

-44305 - Do not make any configuration changes until the device is stably connected.

Modify gateway wlans config


PUT/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/gateways/{gatewayMac}/config/wlans

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify gateway wlans config

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-33221 - The SSID to be edited does not exist.

-33222 - The SSID should contain 1-32 characters.

-33223 - The security key can only contain 8-63 printable ASCII characters or 8-63 hexadecimal digits.

-33231 - The ssid' s name should not be the same with emergency ssid.

-33242 - This SSID VLAN ID cannot be same as the exist default LanNetwork profile.

-33807 - Invalid VLAN ID. Enter a number from 1 to 4094.

-39093 - The length of the device name exceeds the limit.

-39306 - This WLAN group does not exist.

-39307 - Failed to add this AP to the WLAN group because this AP is not in the site of the WLAN group.

-39350 - The SSID of the WLAN group is used in Gateway ACL. Please delete the related ACL rule first.

-39501 - This gateway does not exist.

-44405 - The configuration has been overridden.

Example


```
{
  "wlanId": "",
  "ssidOverrides": [\
    {\
      "index": 0,\
      "globalSsid": "",\
      "bandInfo": 0,\
      "supportBands": [],\
      "security": 0,\
      "enable": true,\
      "vlanEnable": true,\
      "vlanId": 0,\
      "ssid": "",\
      "psk": "",\
      "ssidEnable": true,\
      "hidePwd": true\
    }\
  ],
  "wlansResource": 0
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| gatewayMac | Gateway MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| osgConfigWlansOpenApiVO | OsgConfigWlansOpenApiVO | body | true | OsgConfigWlansOpenApiVO | OsgConfigWlansOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

Move site to target customer


POST/openapi/v1/msp/{mspId}/customers/{customerId}/sites/{siteId}/cmd/gateways/move

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Move site to target customer

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-33421 - The gateway model in the target site is different from the gateway model configured in the WAN Settings Overrides in the original site.

-39034 - Failed to move this site because the devices are upgrading.

-39035 - Failed to move this site because the devices are rebooting.

-39036 - Failed to move this site because the devices are synchronizing configurations.

-39037 - Failed to move this site because the devices are provisioning.

-39050 - This device does not exist.

-39502 - Failed to move the gateway. The target site already has a gateway.

-44261 - The device does not support cluster and can only be adopted to its own site.

Example


```
{
  "deviceMacs": [],
  "deviceMac": "",
  "customer": "",
  "site": ""
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |

modify SSID basic config


PATCH/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/gateways/{gatewayMac}/config/wlans/ssid/{ssidId}/basic-config

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


modify SSID basic config

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Settings Manager Modify

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-33000 - This site does not exist.

-33217 - Invalid SSID security mode.

-33219 - This SSID already exists.

-33220 - Enter a different SSID to override the current SSID.

-33231 - The ssid' s name should not be the same with emergency ssid.

-33235 - PPSK without RADIUS do not support WPA Mode with WPA3-SAE.

-33238 - The number of SSIDs on %band% has reached the limit. At most 8 SSIDs can be created on each band.

-33240 - The SSID name should be between 1 and 32 bytes.

Example


```
{
  "name": "",
  "band": 0,
  "autoWanAccess": true,
  "security": 0,
  "oweEnable": true,
  "broadcast": true,
  "pskSetting": {
    "securityKey": "",
    "versionPsk": 0,
    "encryptionPsk": 0
  }
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| gatewayMac | Gateway MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| ssidId | SSID ID | path | true | string |  |
| updateSsidBasicConfigForIpptOpenApiVO | UpdateSsidBasicConfigForIpptOpenApiVO | body | true | UpdateSsidBasicConfigForIpptOpenApiVO | UpdateSsidBasicConfigForIpptOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.upgradeTime | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.modelTypeInfo | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGridVOUpgradeLogOpenApiInfo |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GridVOUpgradeLogOpenApiInfo | GridVOUpgradeLogOpenApiInfo |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"totalRows": 0,
		"currentPage": 0,
		"currentSize": 0,
		"data": [\
			{\
				"id": "",\
				"modelTypeInfo": {\
					"showModel": "",\
					"compoundModel": ""\
				},\
				"siteNames": [],\
				"siteNum": 0,\
				"currentVersion": [],\
				"targetVersion": "",\
				"upgradeTime": "",\
				"operator": "",\
				"rollbacked": true,\
				"failedDeviceNum": 0\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Create autocheck upgrade plan


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/upgrade/autoCheck

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Create autocheck upgrade plan

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Manual Firmware Upgrade Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-30028 - Operation failed because other operations (backuping, site copying, customer copying, etc.) are being performed on this organization. Please wait and try again later.

-30100 - Please select at least one site.

-7131 - Controller ID not exist.

Example


```
{

    "dayOfWeek": 0,

  "channel": 0
}

| code | description | schema |

| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | createAutoCheckResInfo | createAutoCheckResInfo |

	}
}

Get the uploaded firmware list


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/upgrade/firmwares

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Paging to get the uploaded firmware list

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Manual Firmware Upgrade View Only

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.modelTypeInfo | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.uploadTime | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchKey | Fuzzy query parameters, support field upgrade | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGridVOFirmwareInfo |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GridVOFirmwareInfo | GridVOFirmwareInfo |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"totalRows": 0,
		"currentPage": 0,
		"currentSize": 0,
		"data": [\
			{\
				"id": "",\
				"name": "",\
				"modelTypeInfo": {\
					"showModel": "",\
					"compoundModel": ""\
				},\
				"uploadTime": 0,\
				"description": ""\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Upload upgrade firmware


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/files/upgrade/firmware

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Upload upgrade firmware

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Manual Firmware Upgrade Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-30402 - Failed to upload the firmware file for upgrade.

-39022 - This file size is too large.

-39027 - Invalid upgrade file.

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| description | Description of upload firmware | query | true | string |  |
| showModel | ShowModel of upload firmware, you can also get this field throw: "Get the model of the specified site" | query | true | string |  |
| compoundModel | CompoundModel of upload firmware, you can also get this field throw: "Get the model of the specified site" | query | true | string |  |
| targetEnable | Do the sites set up specified firmware, it should be a value as follows: true, false | query | true | boolean |  |
| targetSites | A string of target site IDs separated by commas, exists when 'targetEnable' is true. | query | false | string |  |
| file | Firmware file. | query | false | file |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseUploadFirmwareResInfo |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | UploadFirmwareResInfo | UploadFirmwareResInfo |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"id": ""
	}
}
```

# OLT

Get OLT info


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get OLT info

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseOltDetailVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | OltDetailVO | OltDetailVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"type": "",
		"mac": "",
		"name": "",
		"model": "",
		"modelVersion": "",
		"compoundModel": "",
		"showModel": "",
		"specialModel": "",
		"firmwareVersion": "",
		"version": "",
		"hwVersion": "",
		"status": 0,
		"statusCategory": 0,
		"es": true,
		"site": "",

Get OLT Management System Interface list


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/system/management-system-interface/get

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get OLT Management System Interface list.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseManagementSystemInterfaceDTO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | ManagementSystemInterfaceDTO | ManagementSystemInterfaceDTO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"systemInterfaces": [\
			{\
				"interfaceId": 0,\
				"interfaceType": "",\
				"interfaceValue": ""\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Modify OLT Management System Interface


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/system/management-system-interface/edit

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify OLT Management System Interface.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-1001 - Invalid request parameters.

-45014 - Interface ID error.

-45015 - Interface type error.

-45016 - Interface value error.

-45017 - The interface does not exist.

Example


```
{
  "systemInterfaces": [\
    {\
      "interfaceId": 0,\
      "interfaceType": "",\
      "interfaceValue": ""\
    }\
  ]
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| managementSystemInterfaceDTO | ManagementSystemInterfaceDTO | body | true | ManagementSystemInterfaceDTO | ManagementSystemInterfaceDTO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

consumes

"\*/\*"\
\]

Modify olt config

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-33004 - Operation failed because other operations (site copying, restoring, template synchronizing, etc.) are being performed on this site. Please wait and try again later.

-39093 - The length of the device name exceeds the limit.

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

Get DDM(Digital Diagnostic Monitoring) status list of OLT port list


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/stat/olt/{deviceMac}/ddm/info

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get DDM(Digital Diagnostic Monitoring) status list of OLT port list

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Example


```
{
  "portList": []
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| dDMStatusRequestVO | DDMStatusRequestVO | body | true | DDMStatusRequestVO | DDMStatusRequestVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseListDDMStatusResultVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | array | DDMStatusResultVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": [\
		{\
			"port": "",\
			"temperature": "",\
			"temperatureFlag": 0,\
			"voltage": "",\
			"voltageFlag": 0,\
			"biasCurrent": "",\
			"biasCurrentFlag": 0,\
			"txPower": "",\
			"txPowerFlag": 0,\
			"rxPower": "",\
			"rxPowerFlag": 0,\
			"transmitFault": 0,\
			"lossOfSignal": true,\
			"dataReady": true\
		}\
	]
}
```

Get ETH Unit1 port list of olt

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseListEthUnit1PortAppDTO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | array | EthUnit1PortAppDTO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": [\
		{\
			"port": "",\
			"mediaType": 0,\
			"description": "",\
			"status": 0,\
			"speed": 0,\
			"duplex": 0,\
			"flowControl": 0,\
			"lag": "",\
			"speedLink": 0,\

Batch Modify ETH Unit1 port of olt


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/l2-feature/eth-port/port/unit1/edit

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Batch Modify ETH Unit1 port of olt

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

-45007 - The deviceResponseBody returned by the device has an error code other than 0

Example


```
{
  "dtos": [\
    {\
      "port": "",\
      "mediaType": 0,\
      "description": "",\
      "status": 0,\
      "speed": 0,\
      "duplex": 0,\
      "flowControl": 0,\
      "lag": "",\
      "speedLink": 0,\
      "duplexLink": 0,\
      "linkStatus": 0,\
      "type": 0,\
      "speedMax": 0\
    }\
  ]
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| ethUnit1PortAppListDTO | EthUnit1PortAppListDTO | body | true | EthUnit1PortAppListDTO | EthUnit1PortAppListDTO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | DeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| deviceType | deviceType should be a value as follows:ap,gateway,switch,pro ap,pro gateway,pro switch,festa ap,festa gateway,festa switch,ems,olt,onu.,Avalible:ap,gateway,switch,pro ap,pro gateway,pro switch,festa ap,festa gateway,festa switch,ems,olt,onu | string |  |
| errcode | Device error code. | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| message | Device error message | string |  |

Move OLT to another site


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/cmd/olts/move

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Move OLT to another site

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-30028 - Operation failed because other operations (backuping, site copying, customer copying, etc.) are being performed on this organization. Please wait and try again later.

-33000 - This site does not exist.

-44261 - The device does not support cluster and can only be adopted to its own site.

Example


```
{
  "deviceMacs": [],
  "stackIds": [],
  "site": ""
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| moveToSiteVO | MoveToSiteVO | body | true | MoveToSiteVO | MoveToSiteVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseMoveSiteProcessVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | MoveSiteProcessVO | MoveSiteProcessVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"moveSiteId": "",
		"finished": true,
		"moveSiteResult": [\
			{\
				"mac": "",\
				"name": "",\
				"moveSiteStatus": 0,\
				"errorCode": 0\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

						"linkSpeed": 0,\
						"duplex": 0,\
						"switchConsistent": true,\
						"ecspFirstVersion": 0,\
						"packageCaptureStatus": 0,\
						"licenseStatusStr": ""\
					}\
				],\
				"onuNum": 0\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Get pon port and eth port of OLT(MSP mode)


GET/openapi/v1/msp/{mspId}/customers/{customerId}/sites/{siteId}/eth-port/and/pon-port/list

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get pon port and eth port of OLT(MSP mode)

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| mspId | mspId | path | true | string |  |
| customerId | customerId | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |

| code | description | schema |

| 200 | OK | OperationResponseEthAndPonListDTO |

| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | EthAndPonListDTO | EthAndPonListDTO |

# Device

Batch add devices by DEVICE KEY.


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/multi-devices/devicekey-add

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Batch add devices by DEVICE KEY.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Adopt Device Manager Access

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39039 - Too many devices imported at a time.

-39042 - Invalid device information in the imported file.

-39043 - Importing... Please wait.

-53125 - The Add Devices function has been locked due to too many invalid attempts.

Example


```
{
  "devices": [\
    {\
      "deviceKey": "",\
      "name": "",\
      "username": "",\
      "password": ""\
    }\
  ]
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceListAddByDevicekeyOpenApiVO | DeviceListAddByDevicekeyOpenApiVO | body | true | DeviceListAddByDevicekeyOpenApiVO | DeviceListAddByDevicekeyOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseDeviceAddRespOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | DeviceAddRespOpenApiVO | DeviceAddRespOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"operateId": ""
	}
}
```

Get site device list


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get site device list.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

MSP Device Manager View Only

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.name | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.status | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.ip | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchKey | Fuzzy query parameters, support field name,mac,ip | query | false | string |  |
| filters.tag | Filter query parameters, support field tag name | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGridVODeviceInfo |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GridVODeviceInfo | GridVODeviceInfo |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"totalRows": 0,
		"currentPage": 0,
		"currentSize": 0,
		"data": [\
			{\
				"mac": "",\
				"name": "",\
				"type": "",\
				"subtype": "",\
				"deviceSeriesType": 0,\
				"model": "",\
				"modelName": "",\
				"ip": "",\
				"ipv6": [],\
				"uptime": "",\
				"status": 0,\
				"detailStatus": 0,\
				"modelVersion": "",\
				"lastSeen": 0,\
				"cpuUtil": 0,\
				"memUtil": 0,\
				"sn": "",\
				"licenseStatus": 0,\
				"tagName": "",\
				"uplinkDeviceMac": "",\
				"uplinkDeviceName": "",\
				"uplinkDevicePort": "",\
				"linkSpeed": 0,\
				"duplex": 0,\
				"switchConsistent": true,\
				"publicIp": "",\
				"firmwareVersion": "",\
				"compatible": 0,\
				"active": true,\
				"inWhiteList": true\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Start adopt device


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceMac}/start-adopt

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Start adopt device.This interface does not return the actual adoptive result, you need to use the interface:Get device adopt result to obtain the adoptive result

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Adopt Device Manager Access

Example


```
{
  "username": "",
  "password": ""
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| adoptDeviceRequest | AdoptDeviceRequest | body | true | AdoptDeviceRequest | AdoptDeviceRequest |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

Forget device.

Site Device Manager Modify

-39014 - To avoid damage, please do not forget the device during upgrading.

-39054 - Controller failed to forget device.

-39055 - Controller has forgotten the device but failed to reset it.

| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}

"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\

"\*/\*"\

Reboot device.

Site Device Manager Modify

-39006 - Operation failed. This device does not exist.

-39007 - Failed to reboot this device because the device is not connected.

-39008 - To avoid damage, please do not reboot the device during upgrading.

-39009 - Rebooting... Please wait.

-39010 - Failed to reboot. The device is synchronizing configurations.

-39011 - Failed to reboot. The controller is making provision for the device.

-39012 - Failed to send the reboot command to the device.

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

	"msg": ""
}

Get global known device list


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/devices/known-devices

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get global known device list.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

MSP Device Manager View Only

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.mac | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchMacs | Fuzzy query parameters, support field mac | query | false | string |  |
| searchNames | Fuzzy query parameters, support field name | query | false | string |  |
| searchModels | Fuzzy query parameters, support field model | query | false | string |  |
| searchSns | Fuzzy query parameters, support field sn | query | false | string |  |
| filters.tag | Filter query parameters, support field tag ID | query | false | string |  |
| filters.deviceSeriesType | Filter query parameters, support field Device series type. 0: basic; 1: pro. | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGridVOGlobalKnownDeviceOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GridVOGlobalKnownDeviceOpenApiVO | GridVOGlobalKnownDeviceOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"totalRows": 0,
		"currentPage": 0,
		"currentSize": 0,
		"data": [\
			{\
				"mac": "",\
				"name": "",\
				"type": "",\
				"subtype": "",\
				"deviceSeriesType": 0,\
				"model": "",\
				"ip": "",\
				"ipv6": [],\
				"uptime": "",\
				"status": 0,\
				"lastSeen": 0,\
				"cpuUtil": 0,\
				"memUtil": 0,\
				"sn": "",\
				"licenseStatus": 0,\
				"needActive": true,\
				"siteName": "",\
				"tagName": ""\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Get global unknown device list


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/devices/unknown-devices

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get global unknown device list.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

MSP Device Manager View Only

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.mac | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchMacs | Fuzzy query parameters, support field mac | query | false | string |  |
| searchNames | Fuzzy query parameters, support field name | query | false | string |  |
| searchModels | Fuzzy query parameters, support field model | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGridVOGlobalUnknownDeviceOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GridVOGlobalUnknownDeviceOpenApiVO | GridVOGlobalUnknownDeviceOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"totalRows": 0,
		"currentPage": 0,
		"currentSize": 0,
		"data": [\
			{\
				"mac": "",\
				"name": "",\
				"type": "",\
				"subtype": "",\
				"deviceSeriesType": 0,\
				"model": "",\
				"ip": "",\
				"uptime": "",\
				"status": 0,\
				"lastSeen": 0\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Copy configuration


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices/copy

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Copy the configuration of one device to another device of the same model. Only for switch and access point.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39050 - This device does not exist.

-39056 - Failed to copy config because of source device not exist.

-39057 - Failed to copy config because of the copied device is different from the model of the source device.

Example


```
{
  "sourceMac": "",
  "targetMac": ""
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceCopyConfigurationOpenApiVO | DeviceCopyConfigurationOpenApiVO | body | true | DeviceCopyConfigurationOpenApiVO | DeviceCopyConfigurationOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

Move site


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceMac}/site-move

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Move the device to another site. If you want to move a networked bridge AP, use the "batch move ap site" interface to move all APs in the bridge network at the same time.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-33000 - This site does not exist.

-33421 - The gateway model in the target site is different from the gateway model configured in the WAN Settings Overrides in the original site.

-39050 - This device does not exist.

-39081 - The device is already in the target site.

-39094 - The site type does not match the device series, pro site can only manage Omada Pro device.

-39095 - The site type does not match the device series, basic site can only manage Omada device.

-39363 - Cannot move the bridge AP(s). Please ensure all the APs in the bridge network are in movable state and move them at the same time.

-39502 - Failed to move the gateway. The target site already has a gateway.

-44261 - The device does not support cluster and can only be adopted to its own site.

Example


```
{
  "targetSite": ""
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMoveSiteOpenApiVO | DeviceMoveSiteOpenApiVO | body | true | DeviceMoveSiteOpenApiVO | DeviceMoveSiteOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

Batch get info of adopted device in global view.


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/devices/batch/info

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Batch get info of adopted device in global view.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Adopt Device Manager Access

Site Add Device Manager Access

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.name | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.status | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.ip | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchKey | Fuzzy query parameters, support field name,mac,ip | query | false | string |  |
| filters.tag | Filter query parameters, support field tag name | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseListBriefDeviceInfoDetailForBatchAdoptOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | array | BriefDeviceInfoDetailForBatchAdoptOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": [\
		{\
			"type": "",\
			"mac": "",\
			"name": "",\
			"model": "",\
			"licenseStatus": 0,\

Batch get info of adopted device in MSP view.


GET/openapi/v1/msp/{mspId}/devices/batch/info

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Batch get info of adopted device in MSP view.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

MSP Adopt Device Manager Access

MSP Add Device Manager Access

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| mspId | MSP ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.name | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.status | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| sorts.ip | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchKey | Fuzzy query parameters, support field name,mac,ip | query | false | string |  |
| filters.tag | Filter query parameters, support field tag name | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseListBriefDeviceInfoDetailForBatchAdoptOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | array | BriefDeviceInfoDetailForBatchAdoptOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": [\
		{\
			"type": "",\
			"mac": "",\
			"name": "",\
			"model": "",\
			"licenseStatus": 0,\
			"compatible": 0,\
			"inWhitelist": true,\
			"statusCategory": 0,\
			"status": 0,\
			"hwVersion": "",\
			"modelVersion": "",\
			"omadacId": "",\
			"wireless": true,\
			"es": true,\
			"deviceSeriesType": 0\
		}\
	]
}

Get Bridge group ungrouped devices


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/grid/bridge-devices/pending

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get Bridge group ungrouped devices.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| page | Start page number. Start from 1. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| pageSize | Number of entries per page. It should be within the range of 1–1000. | query | true | integer(int32) |  |
| sorts.mac | Sort parameter may be one of asc or desc. Optional parameter. If it is not carried, it means it is not sorted by this field. When there are more than one, the first one takes effect | query | false | string |  |
| searchMacs | Fuzzy query parameters, support field mac | query | false | string |  |
| searchNames | Fuzzy query parameters, support field name | query | false | string |  |
| searchModels | Fuzzy query parameters, support field model | query | false | string |  |
| searchSns | Fuzzy query parameters, support field sn | query | false | string |  |
| filters.tag | Filter query parameters, support field tag ID | query | false | string |  |
| filters.deviceSeriesType | Filter query parameters, support field Device series type. 0: basic; 1: pro. | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseGridVODeviceInfo |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | GridVODeviceInfo | GridVODeviceInfo |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"totalRows": 0,
		"currentPage": 0,
		"currentSize": 0,
		"data": [\
			{\
				"mac": "",\
				"name": "",\
				"type": "",\
				"subtype": "",\
				"deviceSeriesType": 0,\
				"model": "",\
				"modelName": "",\
				"ip": "",\
				"ipv6": [],\
				"uptime": "",\
				"status": 0,\
				"detailStatus": 0,\
				"modelVersion": "",\
				"lastSeen": 0,\
				"cpuUtil": 0,\
				"memUtil": 0,\
				"sn": "",\
				"licenseStatus": 0,\
				"tagName": "",\
				"uplinkDeviceMac": "",\
				"uplinkDeviceName": "",\
				"uplinkDevicePort": "",\
				"linkSpeed": 0,\
				"duplex": 0,\
				"switchConsistent": true,\
				"publicIp": "",\
				"firmwareVersion": "",\
				"compatible": 0,\
				"active": true,\
				"inWhiteList": true\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

Move aps to another site


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/aps/site-move

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Move aps to another site. If you want to move networked bridge APs, ensure all APs in the bridge network are in movable state and move them at the same time. This interface will not move non-AP devices.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-1005 - Operation forbidden.

-33000 - This site does not exist.

-39050 - This device does not exist.

-39081 - The device is already in the target site.

-39094 - The site type does not match the device series, pro site can only manage Omada Pro device.

-39095 - The site type does not match the device series, basic site can only manage Omada device.

-39363 - Cannot move the bridge AP(s). Please ensure all the APs in the bridge network are in movable state and move them at the same time.

-44261 - The device does not support cluster and can only be adopted to its own site.

Example


```
{
  "targetSite": "",
  "apMacs": []
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| apMoveSiteOpenApiVO | ApMoveSiteOpenApiVO | body | true | ApMoveSiteOpenApiVO | ApMoveSiteOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseMoveSiteIdOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | MoveSiteIdOpenApiVO | MoveSiteIdOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"moveSiteId": ""
	}
}
```

				"ip": "",\
				"ipv6": [],\

				"detailStatus": 0,\

"\*/\*"\

Site Device Manager View Only

Locate multiple ports of multiple switches


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices/locate/switch-ports

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Locate multiple ports of multiple switches

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

Device Config Page Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39005 - Failed to adopt this device because the device is not connected.

-39121 - One or multiple devices do not support port locating.

Example


```
{
  "portListVOs": [\
    {\
      "mac": "",\
      "portList": []\
    }\
  ],
  "stackPortListVOs": [\
    {\
      "stackId": "",\
      "standardPorts": []\
    }\
  ],
  "locateEnable": true
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| locateOswPortsOpenApiVO | LocateOswPortsOpenApiVO | body | true | LocateOswPortsOpenApiVO | LocateOswPortsOpenApiVO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseLocateOswPortsResultOpenApiVO |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | LocateOswPortsResultOpenApiVO | LocateOswPortsResultOpenApiVO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"locateOswPortsResultList": [\
			{\
				"mac": "",\
				"errorCode": 0,\
				"errorMsg": ""\
			}\
		],
		"locateStackPortsResultList": [\
			{\
				"stackId": "",\
				"errorCode": 0,\
				"errorMsg": ""\
			}\
		]
	}
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |

Start online upgrade


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceMac}/start-online-upgrade

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Upgrade the device with the latest firmware in the cloud. It is suggested to check firmware update before the operation, or the firmware might not be the latest

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39020 - Failed to upgrade because no device is ready for upgrading.

-39026 - The upgrade file is the same with the current version.

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

Site Device Manager Modify

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseOnlineUpgradeRes |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | OnlineUpgradeRes | OnlineUpgradeRes |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"finished": true,
		"success": true
	}
}
```

Start batch rolling upgrade


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/multi-devices/start-rolling-upgrade

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Batch online upgrade the devices in a certain order in the site. It is suggested to check firmware update before the operation, or the firmware might not be the latest

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39020 - Failed to upgrade because no device is ready for upgrading.

Example


```
{
  "macs": []
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| rollingUpgradeRequest | RollingUpgradeRequest | body | true | RollingUpgradeRequest | RollingUpgradeRequest |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseUpgradeTask |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | UpgradeTask | UpgradeTask |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"taskId": ""
	}
}
```

Get the result of the given rolling upgrade task


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/multi-devices/rolling-upgrade-tasks/{taskId}

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get the result of the rolling upgrade task. The results include whether the task is finished and how many devices have not completed the upgrade.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| taskId | Task ID. The ID is the return value of 'Start batch rolling upgrade' interface. | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseRollingUpgradeRes |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | RollingUpgradeRes | RollingUpgradeRes |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"finished": true,
		"unfinishedCount": 0
	}
}
```

End the rolling upgrade task


DELETE/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/multi-devices/rolling-upgrade-tasks/{taskId}

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Cancel the rolling upgrade task in the site. But the devices which have completed the upgrade will not be rolled back to the old version

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| taskId | Task ID. The ID is the return value of 'Start batch rolling upgrade' interface. | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseWithoutResult |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": ""
}
```

Upload device firmware


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/devices/upgrade-file

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"multipart/form-data"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Upload device firmware for manually upgrade.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Manual Firmware Upgrade Access

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39021 - Invalid file for upgrading.

-39022 - This file size is too large.

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| file | Upload a file in request body. | query | true | file |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseFile |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | File | File |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"fileId": ""
	}
}
```

Start manually upgrade


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/multi-devices/start-manually-upgrade

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Manually upgrade the devices of the same model in the site. The firmware needs to be uploaded first. Note: Each site can only execute one multi-device upgrade task at a time, and there is a number limit of the tasks that can be executed simultaneously in the controller.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Manual Firmware Upgrade Access

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39020 - Failed to upgrade because no device is ready for upgrading.

-39050 - This device does not exist.

-43704 - The file has expired.

Example


```
{
  "macs": [],
  "fileId": ""
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| upgradeRequest | UpgradeRequest | body | true | UpgradeRequest | UpgradeRequest |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseUpgradeTask |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | UpgradeTask | UpgradeTask |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"taskId": ""
	}
}
```

Get the result of the given manually upgrade task


GET/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/multi-devices/manually-upgrade-tasks/{taskId}

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Get the result of the manually upgrade task. The results include whether the task is finished and how many devices have not completed the upgrade.

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Manual Firmware Upgrade Access

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| taskId | Task ID. The ID is the return value of 'Start manually upgrade' interface. | path | true | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseUpgradeRes |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | UpgradeRes | UpgradeRes |

Response Example


```

	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"finished": true,
		"unfinishedCount": 0
	}
}

Start batch rolling upgrade By Query


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/cmd/devices/onlineRollingUpgrade

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Perform batch online upgrades of devices in a specific order within the site, and filter them using filter conditions. It is recommended to check the firmware update status before the operation, otherwise the firmware may not be the latest version

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-39020 - Failed to upgrade because no device is ready for upgrading.

Example


```
{
  "macs": []
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| rollingUpgradeRequest | RollingUpgradeRequest | body | true | RollingUpgradeRequest | RollingUpgradeRequest |
| filters.ecspFirstVersion | Filter query parameters, support field ecsp first version. 1: ecsp v1; 2: ecsp v2 | query | false | string |  |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseUpgradeTask |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | UpgradeTask | UpgradeTask |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"taskId": ""
	}
}
```

# OLT Service Port

Modify an existing service port


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/pon/service-ports/edit

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify an existing service port

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Example


```
{
  "ponPortId": 0,
  "ponPortStr": "",
  "svlan": 0,
  "gemPortId": 0,
  "userVlan": 0,
  "userVlanPriority": 0,
  "tagAction": "",
  "innerVlan": 0,
  "innerVlanPriority": 0,
  "etherType": "",
  "inboundTrafficProfileId": 0,
  "outboundTrafficProfileId": 0,
  "index": 0,
  "description": "",
  "onuId": 0,
  "adminStatus": "",
  "statisticPerformance": ""
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| servicePortModifyDTO | ServicePortModifyDTO | body | true | ServicePortModifyDTO | ServicePortModifyDTO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseDeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | DeviceResponseBodyVoid | DeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"deviceType": "",
		"errcode": 0,
		"message": "",
		"data": {}
	}
}
```

"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify an existing traffic profile

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Example


```
{
  "name": "",
  "rateLimitStatus": "",
  "cirValue": 0,
  "cbsValue": 0,
  "pirValue": 0,
  "pbsValue": 0,
  "priority": "",
  "priorityValue": 0,
  "innerPriority": "",
  "innerPriorityValue": 0,
  "priorityPolicy": "",
  "isInUse": true,
  "trafficId": 0
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| trafficProfileModifyDTO | TrafficProfileModifyDTO | body | true | TrafficProfileModifyDTO | TrafficProfileModifyDTO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseDeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | DeviceResponseBodyVoid | DeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"deviceType": "",
		"errcode": 0,
		"message": "",
		"data": {}
	}
}
```

POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/pon/profile/service/{serviceId}/pots-ports/edit

produces

"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\

\]


consumes

\]


Note


Modify an existing ont pots port

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Example


```
{
  "serviceId": 0,
  "vlanConfigMode": "",
  "configItemAddList": [\
    {\
      "vlanMode": "",\
      "svlan": 0,\
      "spriority": 0,\
      "cvlan": 0,\
      "cpriority": 0\
    }\
  ],
  "configItemDeleteList": [],
  "configItemEditList": [\
    {\
      "id": 0,\
      "vlanMode": "",\
      "svlan": 0,\
      "spriority": 0,\
      "cvlan": 0,\
      "cpriority": 0\
    }\
  ]
}
```

Params


| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| serviceId | Service Profile ID should be a number between 0-512 | path | true | string |  |
| ontPotsPortModifyDTO | OntPotsPortModifyDTO | body | true | OntPotsPortModifyDTO | OntPotsPortModifyDTO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseDeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

}

| code | description | schema |

\]


consumes

"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Batch delete existing ONU auto find config

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager View Only

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Example


```
{
  "keys": []
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |

| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |

| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | DeviceResponseBodyVoid | DeviceResponseBodyVoid |

	"msg": "",
	"result": {

		"errcode": 0,
		"message": "",
		"data": {}
	}
}

# OLT ONU Management

Reboot ONU


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/pon/onu-management/informations/onu/reboot

produces

\[\
"application/x-www-form-urlencoded",\
"application/json"\
\]


consumes

\[\
"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Reboot ONU

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

-45007 - The deviceResponseBody returned by the device has an error code other than 0

Example


```
{
  "rebootRequestList": [\
    {\
      "equipmentId": "",\
      "key": "",\
      "macAddress": ""\
    }\
  ]
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| onuInformationRebootRequestDTO | OnuInformationRebootRequestDTO | body | true | OnuInformationRebootRequestDTO | OnuInformationRebootRequestDTO |

| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseDeviceResponseBodyListSingleOnuRebootResponseDTO |

| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | DeviceResponseBodyListSingleOnuRebootResponseDTO | DeviceResponseBodyListSingleOnuRebootResponseDTO |

Response Example


```
{
	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"deviceType": "",

Modify an existing ONU description


POST/openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/olts/{deviceMac}/pon/onu-management/informations/description/edit

"application/json"\
\]


consumes

"\*/\*"\
\]


Note


Modify an existing ONU description

The interface requires one of the permissions:

Site Device Manager Modify

The possible error code for the interface in the returned body is one of the following error codes (non generic error codes):

-45000 - This OLT does not exist.

-45001 - The OLT is offline. Please reconnect

-45002 - OLT upgrading... Cannot manage the device now.

-45003 - OLT rebooting... Cannot manage the device now.

Example


```
{
  "key": "",
  "onuDescription": ""
}
```

| name | description | in | require | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| omadacId | Omada ID | path | true | string |  |
| siteId | Site ID | path | true | string |  |
| deviceMac | Device MAC address, like AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF | path | true | string |  |
| onuInformationDescriptionEditConfigDTO | OnuInformationDescriptionEditConfigDTO | body | true | OnuInformationDescriptionEditConfigDTO | OnuInformationDescriptionEditConfigDTO |

Status


| code | description | schema |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | OK | OperationResponseDeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Params


| name | description | type | schema |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| errorCode |  | integer(int32) | integer(int32) |
| msg |  | string |  |
| result |  | DeviceResponseBodyVoid | DeviceResponseBodyVoid |

Response Example


```

	"errorCode": 0,
	"msg": "",
	"result": {
		"deviceType": "",
		"errcode": 0,
		"message": "",
		"data": {}
	}
}
